name: Charlie's Pickled Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, bring the water, salt, crab boil, and pepper to a boil.
2. Squeeze in the lemon juice and add the rinds.
3. Pour in the shrimp and bring back to a boil over high heat.
4. Boil for 3 minutes only, then remove from heat.
5. Add 3-4 cups ice cubes to the pot to stop cooking. Let stand 5-10 minutes.
6. Remove the shrimp when cool enough to handle; peel but leave the last tail segment attached. Set aside.
7. In a large bowl, stir together the remaining ingredients.
8. Add the peeled shrimp to the marinade and toss well to coat.
9. Cover tightly and refrigerate overnight or up to two days, tossing occasionally in the marinade.
10. Drain before serving on a platter or decorative bowl lined with lettuce leaves. Garnish with ripe olives.
